data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of suggesting times based on integrated calendar availability. However, the evidence does not provide any confirmation that the system integrates with a calendar to suggest available times, which is a critical aspect of the requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for this functionality, but there is no supporting evidence that it has been implemented or validated, leading to a gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of calendar integration to suggest available times.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
